pool.baseline:
hey, i've been seeing these intermittent "Connection Reset by Peer" errors in our production EC2 instances on AWS. it's not constant, just happens every few hours. 

here's a snippet from the CloudWatch logs:
2023-10-27T14:22:01Z ERROR [connection-handler] remote peer closed connection unexpectedly: Connection reset by peer (errno: 104)
2023-10-27T14:25:44Z ERROR [connection-handler] remote peer closed connection unexpectedly: Connection reset by peer (errno: 104)

could this be an issue with our security group configs or something else in the VPC setup?

hey, i've been seeing these intermittent "Connection Reset by Peer" errors in our production EC2 instances on AWS. it's not constant, just happens every few hours.

could this be an issue with our security group configs or something else in the VPC setup?
